sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, data FixedString(20)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO fuzz_test (id, data) VALUES (1, randomFixedString(20));
UPDATE fuzz_test SET data = randomFixedString(20) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toTypeName(data) FROM fuzz_test WHERE data = randomFixedString(20);
DELETE FROM fuzz_test WHERE data = randomFixedString(20);
